title: FC Rebels bring Oyster soccer festival trophy home to Hornlee
description: KNYSNA NEWS - FC Rebels from Hornlee were...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - FC Rebels from Hornlee were crowned champions of the Oyster soccer festival last Sunday following a well-deserved 2-0 victory over FC United in an action-packed final held at Loerie Park Stadium.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - FC Rebels from Hornlee were crowned champions of the Oyster soccer festival last Sunday following a well-deserved 2-0 victory over FC United in an action-packed final held at Loerie Park Stadium."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This tightly contested match saw Roger Armoed opening the score for the Rebels from a penalty spot in the first half, before Simamkele Seconds sealed the win with a powerful second-half strike.","html":"This tightly contested match saw Roger Armoed opening the score for the Rebels from a penalty spot in the first half, before Simamkele Seconds sealed the win with a powerful second-half strike."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The win caps off a strong tournament performance by FC Rebels, who booked their place in the final by edging Red Eagles 2-1 in the semi-finals."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"FC United had reached the final after a tense penalty shoot-out victory over Young Boys.","html":"FC United had reached the final after a tense penalty shoot-out victory over Young Boys."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The battle for the ball between FC United players and FC Rebels (green). Photos: Zama Gagu","html":"The battle for the ball between FC United players and FC Rebels (green). Photos: Zama Gagu"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Goalkeeper Angelo Manuel stood tall for the Rebels, pulling off several crucial saves to deny FC United clear chances.","html":"Goalkeeper Angelo Manuel stood tall for the Rebels, pulling off several crucial saves to deny FC United clear chances."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"FC Rebels head coach Testony Sinclair said his team was thrilled with the win."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"The boys showed great character and discipline throughout the tournament. We will take these positives into the regional league and aim to keep improving,\" he said.","html":"\"The boys showed great character and discipline throughout the tournament. We will take these positives into the regional league and aim to keep improving,\" he said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This year's edition of the Oyster Soccer Festival featured 32 teams and drew large crowds, showcasing local football talent and community spirit.","html":"This year's edition of the Oyster Soccer Festival featured 32 teams and drew large crowds, showcasing local football talent and community spirit."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
